channel.title: standard ml on Hugo O Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in standard ml on Hugo O Rivera

item.title: Tutoring
item.description: I am your math, language, and programming tutor Qualifications: I worked as a tutor at the Computer Science department of the New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology for two years. I have a degree in mathematics and a degree in computer science from the same school, graduated with a 3.5 GPA in 4.5 years. Math, logic, and computer science I can tutor you in most math classes up to advanced mathematical-physics and statistics courses.
